Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/10/11 (64-bit only)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 5500k 2,5 GHz or equivalent (64-bit only)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 910 or equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Standard
  • Additional Notes: NOT COMPATIBLE WITH WINDOWS 10S! This game is expected to run at 1080p/30 FPS. If you have don't have enough graphics memory to run the game at your selected texture quality, you must go to Options > Graphics and lower the texture quality or shadow quality, use dynamic resolution, or decrease the resolution. A DirectX hardware ray tracing capable GPU like NVIDIA GeForce® RTX 20 Series and higher, and AMD Radeon™ RX 6000 Series and higher are required to activate hardware ray tracing. A DirectX 11/12 and Shader Model 5 compatible graphic card is required to activate software ray tracing (Lumen). An NVIDIA GeForce®️ RTX 20 Series graphic card is required to activate DLSS. An internet connection is required for product activation. (Network connectivity uses Steam® developed by Valve® Corporation.)
